zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Lucy於1239年出生在英國波藍德時，她的父親Geoffrey de Lucy32歲，母親Nichole de Cantilupe23歲。她於1256年與Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾巴頓 澤亞格拉福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年3月10日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Lucy于1239年出生在英国波藍德时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Lucy32岁，母亲Nichole de Cantilupe23岁。她于1256年与Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾巴頓 澤亞格拉福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年3月10日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Lucy was born in 1239, in Cumberland, England, her father, Geoffrey de Lucy, was 32 and her mother, Nichole de Cantilupe, was 23. She married Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave in 1256, in Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 March 1289, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

Elle a épousé Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave en 1256, à Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1289, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Lucyが1239年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Lucyは32歳，母Nichole de Cantilupeは23歳であった。1256年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバートン セアグラブでNicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年3月10日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Lucy(이)가 1239년 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Lucy(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole de Cantilupe(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 바턴 시그레이브에서 Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Lucy родилась в 1239 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Lucy было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Nichole de Cantilupe, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave в 1256 г. в местности бартон сиграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 марта 1289 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
